originalTitle: Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
content: A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option! ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! chineseContent: 新的传奇开始了！ 《黑色四叶草》第二季将于 2026 年登陆 Crunchyroll！在 Crunchyroll 上观看《黑色四叶草》！ https://got.cr/cc-bcpv 在一个魔法就是一切的世界里，阿斯塔和尤诺在同一天被发现被遗弃在教堂里。尤诺拥有非凡的魔法力量，而阿斯塔是这个世界上唯一没有魔法力量的人。十五岁时，两人都收到了魔法书，这是一种可以增强持有者魔法的魔法书。阿斯塔的魔法书是一本罕见的反魔法魔法书，可以抵消并击退对手的咒语。尤诺和阿斯塔是对立但又很好的对手，他们准备迎接最艰难的挑战，以实现他们共同的梦想：成为巫师之王。放弃永远不是一个选择！关于 CRUNCHYROLL Crunchyroll 是观看所有您喜爱的动漫的地方！流媒体播放新动漫、完整剧集、电影、OVA、音乐、片头、结局、预告片以及动漫中的所有精彩时刻（配有字幕和配音）！ ▶ 在 YouTube 上观看完整动漫剧集：https://got.cr/cc-pt 🔶 获取免费 7 天 CRUNCHYROLL 试用版：https://got.cr/cc-7dayspv #BlackClover #Anime #Crunchyroll
